calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Verified Petition And Verified Petition For The Inspection And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jennifer L. Schiffner, Esq. of Pahl & McCay, Tel. 408.286.5100, for petitioner and moving party;
Katherine Hyang Wol Dick, Esq. of Morgan Lewis, Tel. 415.442.1421, for respondent and opposing party.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES' Verified Petition For The Inspection And Production Of Documents is Denied. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Petition For The Inspection And Production Of Documents (Ccp 2035.010)
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO GIRLS CHORUS, INC.'S Petition For The Inspection And Production Of Documents (Ccp 2035.010) is OFF CALENDAR; CALENDARED IN ERROR. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Petition For The Inspection And Production Of Documents( Ccp 2035.010)
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance in this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CANTRELL, HARRIS & ASSOCIATES's Petition For The Inspection And Production Of Documents (CCP 2035.010) is Off Calendar per Local Rule 2.6 (... Failure to lodge courtesy copies of moving papers at least three days before a hearing or as otherwise required by statute, rule or court order may, in the discretion of the judicial officer presiding over the hearing, result in denial of the motion, continuance of the hearing, or taking the motion off calendar. ...). Pro Tem Judge: Mark Schreiber; Not reported
